titleStmt.title: SII 9.101: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 101. (A.R. No. 443 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE UDDIBASAVANNA TEMPLE AT MORIGERI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 967, Pārthiva, Kārtika, puṇṇame, Bṛihaspativāra, Sōma-grahaṇa, Saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta, corresponding to A.D. 1045 October 28, Monday (not Thursday), with a lunar eclipse and refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalla-Āhavamalladēva. It mentions the Noḷamba chief Ghaṭeyaṅkakāradēva, his son Udayādityadēva, his son Jagadēkamalla-Noḷamba called also Irmmaḍi-Noḷamba and his brother Traiḷōkyamalla-Nanni-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍi who, as the feudatory of the Chālukya king, was ruling over Ballakunde three-thousand, Kōgaḷi five-hundred, Kadambaḷige thousand, Kudiyaharavi seventy, Kariviḍi thirty, and Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. It states that the brave and warlike Leṅka—1000, with the Daṇḍanāyaka Tikaṇṇa as their chief, were ruling over the six towns viz., (1) Ammeḷe, (2) Nellikudiru, (3) Sonna, (4) Poḻalgunde, (5) Sūgūru and (6) Mōriṅgeṟe. For the merit of Udayādityadēva the Leṅka—1000 made provision to feed 24 persons in a satra and having set up the images of Noḷaṁbēśvara and Leṅkēśvara they obtained the tract of land called Savaṇṭiya-pāḷu from the king and renaming it Śivapura had it granted for the worship of the gods and for imparting education. They caused the gift to be made by Ghaṭṭiyarasa after washing the feet of Sōmēśvara Paṇḍita of Siṁha-parshe, the head of a maṭha in Kōgaḷi and the disciple of Jñānēśvara-Paṇḍita, who was the disciple of Maleyāḷa-Paṇḍita while the king was camping at Pūvina-Paḍaṅgile after the capture of Śivāpa. It also records that Chaṭṭarasa, Ghaṭṭiyarasa, the Sēnabōva Gōvindayya and others made gifts of land for the maintenance of Dēvadāsis, their music band and other temple servants, and the mason Muchchōja. It is insisted that the ascetics of the place should strictly maintain their character and that ascetics of loose character should at once be driven out, with the help of the Nāḍarasa and the 12 Mahājanas of the place. The writer of the record was Nāgamayya and the engraver Muchchōja, son of Aggaḷōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrījayasiṁhavallabhāgrajaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ
trailōkyamallaṁ śrīmadāhavamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrā
rkkatāraṁ saluttire svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda pallavānvaya śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ pallavakuḷati
ḷakanēkavākyaṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ rājavidyādharaṁ kandukācāryyaniṟivabeḍaṁga noḷaṁba
ghaṭeyaṁkakāṟadēvaṁ tasyāgrasutaṁ ghaṭeyoḍegaṇḍa raṇaraṁgabhīmaṁ jagadēkamallanoḷaṁbanuda
yādityadēvaṁ tasyāgrataneyaṁ rājagajasiṁhanēkāṁgavīraṁ jagadēkamallanoḷaṁbanirmmaḍinoḷaṁba tasyā
nujaṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda pallavānvaya śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ pallavakuḷatiḷaka namōghavākyaṁ
kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ vairinārāyaṇaṁ drōhakāḷānaḷaṁ maṇḍaḷikatriṇētraṁ rājamanōjaṁ hayavatsa
rājaṁ citraveḍaṁgaṁ tyāgacintāmaṇi rājagajasarvvajñaṁ śrīmatrailōkyamallananninoḷaṁbapallavape
rmmānaḍigaḷ ballakuṁde mūnūṟuvaṁ kōgaḷiyaynūṟuvaṁ kadaṁbaḷige sāyiramumaṁ kudiyaha
raviyeḻpattumaṁ karividi mūvattumaṁ paṁcagrāmaṁgaḷumaṁ noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvatticchāsiramumana
caḷapravṛttiyiṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanadināḷuttire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷ . vṛttaṁ .
nuḍivudu nanni māḍuvudu kīrttanamīvude sadvinōdamoykane maṟevokkaṟanneṟeye kāva guṇam basa
naṁ mahājiyoḷsedeyaduduggiyeṁdu nuḍivīnuḍi lēṁkaroḷāvakālamuṁ naḍevudu paṇḍitarppogaḷe
bhēriya gōsane bhūtaḷāgradoḷ . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara śrīnoḷaṁbādhirājaśrīpā
dapadmāmōdāsaktamadhukarar . vairibaḷabhīkararppallavānvayamahārājarājyamūḷastaṁbhātmakarccama
rīdhvajavirājitarānevaṟeghōṣaṇarssatyamaṇibhūṣaṇarddharmmānukūḷar jayavadhūlōlar
kaṇḍaḷīmūḷabhadrōdbhavavīrāvatārarēkaykavīrarddīnānāthacintāmaṇigaḷāśritajanakaḷpavṛkṣarssara
ṇāgatavajrapaṁjara nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyaka tikaṇnapramukha
leṁkasāsirvvaru Armmeḷe . nellikudiru . sonna . poḻalguṁde . sūgūru . mōriṁgeṟe modalāgāṟuṁ bāḍamu
manaṇugajīvitavāgi tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyināḷuttaṁ . kaṁda . vāridhiparivṛtadhātrīnāriya vadana
davoleseva kōgaḷināḍoḷmōriṁgeṟe tiḷakāḷaṁkāramananukaripudene janaṁ baṇnisadē . Aṁtenisida
grahāraṁ mōriṁgeṟeyoḷ śrīmadudayādityadēvaṁge parōkṣavineyavirppattanālvargge satra
vumaṁ noḷaṁbēśvaranumaṁ māḍisi tamma pesara leṁkēśvaranaṁ māḍisi dēvarupa bhōgakka pādamū
laparivārakka maṭhada vidyādānakkavendarasargge binnapaṁgeydu savaṁṭiyapāḷaṁ paḍedadarkke śivapu
rameṁdu pesaraniṭṭu sakavarṣa 967 neya pārtthivasaṁvatsarada kārttikada puṇname bṛha
spativāra . sōmagrahaṇa . saṁkrānti vyatīpātavintī tithigaḷ kūḍida puṇyadinadoḷ .
Arasarddhāḷikramadoḷ śivāpaṁna piḍidu maguḷe baṁdu pūvinapaḍaṁgiliyappayaṇavīḍinoḷ
svasti saṁsārapārāvāramadajaḷa mahāprayāsōttuṁgataraṁgabhaṁgabhagnamagnānēkaprāṇijāti
karimakaratimitimiṁgiḷaprabhṛtiprakṣubhitāvarttagartāṁtaḥpatitaśivānugṛhītaśiṣṭajanōttara
ṇakaraṇasāmartthyōpētapuraṁdarabaliṁdamāraviṁdanaṁdanadivyamunibṛṁdavaṁditasuṁdaracaraṇāraviṁda
śrīmallakuḷīśamukhakamaḷavinirggataśakaḷaśāstrārtthasadbhāvābhijñar . yamaniyamāsanaprāṇāyāma
pratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇajapasamādhisampannarappa kōgaḷiyaynūṟaṟa maṭhādhipatigaḷa
ppa siṁhaparṣaya śrīmanmaleyāḷapaṇḍitadēvara vara śiṣyarssamastaśāstravādapāragarappa śrī
majñānēśvarapaṇḍitara varaśiṣyaryyamaniyamāsanaprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇaja
pasamādhisampannarappa śrīmatsōmēśvarapaṇḍitarggaṇnigeṟeya nagarēśvaradoḷirddēvargaṁ baḷiya
na(gha)ṭṭiyarasariṁ kālaṁ kaḻcisi sarvanamasyaṁ sarvvābhyantarasiddhi sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ dēvabhōgavāge bi
ṭṭar . svasti samastaduṣṭārātimanneyamadāndhagandhagajasinhasāhasōttuṁganujjeni pura-varēśvara guttara
bhīma caladaṁkarāma nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmat ballavāḍiyeḻpattara manneya
caṭṭarasa pādapūjeyaṁ koṁḍalliya manneyasāmyamanabhyaṁtarasiddhiyāge biṭṭa . svasti samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtaṁ banavāsīpuravarēśvaraṁ kadaṁbarābharaṇaṁ parāṁganāputraṁ satyakānīna śaucāṁja
nēya saṁgrāmajattalaṭṭa manne yavallaha śrīsāmantagaruḍapādapaṁkajabhramara nāmādisama
staprasastisahita kōgaḷiyaynoṟaṟa manneyaṁ śrīmat ghaṭṭiyarasa mōriṁgeṟeya noḷa
śvarapurada manneyasāmyavanabhyaṁtarasiddhi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ biṭṭa . nellikudirūroḍeya dāsima
noḷagāgi nellikudiraldēvargge pūvinatōṇṭavuvaṁ biṭṭar . Aṁtāyūrāyasthānamaṁ mūru bhā
māḍidalli dēvara bhāgadoḷage lēṁkara sēnabōvaṁ gōviṁdayyaṁ koṇḍaṁgeṟeyēriya mēle
bēśvarada pratibaddhamāge māḍisida gōviṁdēśvaradēvargge biṭṭa kariya mattaraṁṭu kisumattar nālku
Aṁtu biṭṭa panneraḍu mattaru pattukoḷaga vedeyagaḻdeyuṁ naḍevudu . maṭhada vidyādānakkondu bhāga
parigrahadoṁdu bhāgadoḷage perggaḍecāvuṇḍamayyaṁge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ kariyamattareṁṭu kisumattarnnā
lku piriyaraṁ yyaṁge mattarppanneraḍu . sūḷevāḷaṁge mattarppanneraḍu . vaṁsigarirvvarggemāgi
mattarirppattanālku paṟekāṟaṁge mattarirppattanālku . sūḷeyarppannirvvaroḷage piriyaranuvallada
sūḷeyarppadiṁbargge pattumattara savakaṭṭinoḷmattarnnūṟu ghaḷigeya māṇigaḷnālvarggaveṁṭu ma
ttara savakaṭṭinoḷmattarmmūvatteraḍu . kalisiṁdanoḷagāgi kāhināḍayvargge mattarnnālvattu khaṇḍasphuṭitaṁ mo
dalāgellā besanumaṁ naḍeyisuva rūvāri muccōjaṁge mattarppanneraḍu . naṭṭavaṁge mattarppanneraḍu .
Intī parigrahavellaṁ dēvarggaṁ tapōdhanarggaṁ besakeyduṇbaralli duṣṭaraṁ tapōdhanarddaṇḍisi naḍeyisuvar
Idu naiṣṭhikasthānamilli naiṣṭhikarallada tapōdhanamiralāgadu brahmacaryyadiṁ keṭṭu naḍeva tapōdhana
raṁ nāḍanāḷvarasuṁ maṁneyanu mōriṁgeṟeya pannirvarūroḍeyaruvirdu poramaḍisiyavara
saṁtatiya naiṣṭhikara nirisuvaridanupēkṣegeydavarggī dharmmamanaḷida dōṣavakku . Ācārageṭṭu pōga
de moṇḍiyatanaṁ geydu naḍevaṁ śvānagārdabhacaṇḍāḷanātaṁ sattaḍe pandi sattudu nāysattudu Intī dharmma
maṁ rakṣisidātaṁge vāraṇāsiyoḷsūryyagrahaṇadandu sāsirakavileya dēvarggaṁ brāhmaṇarggaṁ
koṭṭa puṇyamakku . Ī dharmmamanaḷivātaṁgamaḷiyaloḍaṁbaṭṭaṁga vāraṇāsiyoḷaṁ kurukṣētrado
ḷaṁ sāsira kavileyumaṁ tapōdhanarumaṁ brāhmaṇaruma(ṁ)naḷida dōṣamakku . bahubhirvasudhā dattā rāja
ssagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvva
sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yatpradānādvasētsvarggē yāvatkāḷasya saṁkhyayā . tasmācchataguṇaṁ kālaṁ tadva
kē vasēt . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁ
yō bhūyō yācatē rāma . śrīmadaṇnigeṟeya nagarēśvara vidyābharaṇajīya
gaṁ nāgamayyaṁ baredaṁ mō Aggaḷōjana magaṁ rūvāri muccōjaṁ besageyda . maṁgaḷaṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 9.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
